confidence_rationale: Video shows hand movements consistent with endoloop task but lacks clear view of target appendage, marked line, and specific placement accuracy. Cannot determine critical scoring elements like deviation from mark or exact loop position.

Exact deviation measurement from target mark
Whether loop is positioned at correct anatomical location
Final loop position relative to marked target
technique_summary: Excellent time performance at 21 seconds (expert level) with smooth, coordinated movements throughout all phases. However, critical scoring elements cannot be assessed due to video perspective limitations.
strengths: Smooth, efficient movements through all task phases
Good hand coordination and loop handling technique
improvement_suggestions: Video assessment limited by camera angle - cannot provide specific technical feedback on placement accuracy
